title: row_number() columns should be materialized after selection
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE c(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO c (id, name, age) VALUES(1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO c (id, name, age) VALUES(2, 'Bob', NULL);
CREATE VIEW d AS SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY id) AS rn, name FROM c;
key_bug_features: row_number() columns not materialized after selection
